name: button
title: Button
description: Trigger an action or navigate. Supports six variants and four sizes.
a11y: Interactive element must have a discernible label (text or aria-label).
Disabled buttons are removed from the tab order — prefer aria-disabled for async states.

do: Use `primary` for the single most important action on a surface.
Pair `secondary` with `primary` when two actions coexist.
dont: Don't stack more than two buttons of the same variant side-by-side.
Don't use `link` variant inside dense tables — use a text link instead.
